claim_profiles.claim_scope: only the exact tested source and target runtime-operator, placement, custody, durability, and assurance tuple

evaluation_rules.case_evaluation: expected case verdict defaults to pass; a case passes only when observed operation disposition and expected subject report verdict match the scenario, so an expected incomplete subject report is a passing evaluator self-test rather than an incomplete claim
evaluation_rules.execution_case_identity: bind scenario id, all fixture ids and hashes, overlay ids and hashes, the inspectable case-parameter manifest ref and hash, and predecessor report and evidence hashes into one execution_case_id
evaluation_rules.fixture_execution: execute each selected scenario against every directly required compatible fixture unless fixture_binding is joint_all_listed_fixtures; prerequisite claims retain and execute their own fixtures and evidence cannot be reused across fixture hashes
evaluation_rules.overlay_execution: begin each overlay from the passing predecessor claim state; predecessor report and evidence refs and hashes are mandatory for every overlay execution case
evaluation_rules.scenario_selection: execute every scenario whose required_for_claims names the claim; this index is the sole requirement-to-claim mapping

overlays.case_parameter_binding: every migration scenario binds the same exact claim-scoped case-parameter manifest ref and hash
